text:
One Christmas morning, Rudolph was bored. He went outside on a big snowflake tracker. He went far out into snow-covered fields. He started singing his own song.

Rudolph sang about flying around on a very pretty yellow button-fly. He didn't want any silly little bugs; he was really into stars. He flew around, saying:

"You want my shiny stars? That's no button-fly, silly!"

He sang that repeatedly. He didn't realize until later that they were beetles. They weren't mad. They were happy.

They all went to sleep.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
